zh.lifeSummary: 當Alexander "Alastair Carrach" MacDonald Lord of Lochaber, 1st of Keppoch於1365年出生在蘇格蘭阿爾迪史爾可盧登 貝時，他的父親John Carrach MacDonald of the Isles45歲，母親Princess Margaret Stewart of Scotland29歲。他於大約1390年與Margaret Lennox在蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1440年在蘇格蘭藍納可爾凱普享年75歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭藍納可爾凱普。

nameMeanings.name: MacDonald
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: McDonald
meanings: Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Domhnaill ‘son of Domhnall’, a name derived from the Celtic elements domno- ‘world’ + val- ‘might, rule’. Donald is an Anglicized form (via Latin) of this personal name used in Scotland, though the surname is also widespread in Ireland. The name is equivalent to Irish McDonnell and McConnell , and to Manx Cannell .

History: This is the name of the largest and most disparate of the Scottish clans (Clan Donald), associated in particular with the Hebrides and claiming descent from Domhnall mac Raghnaill mac Somhairle, who lived in the late 12th century. From that time until 1493 the head of the clan was known as Lord (or King) of the Isles. The reigns of the Lords of the Isles were always stormy, often in conflict with the kings of Scotland, and peppered with disasters. After a series of defeats in the 1480s, Eoin Mac Dhomhnaill a Ìle (John Macdonald of Islay, Earl of Ross and Lord of the Isles) forfeited his lands, his power, and his title as Lord of the Isles in 1493 to King James IV of Scotland. By then, a branch of the family had settled in the Antrim Glens in Ireland and members moved between the southern Hebrides and Ireland throughout the 16th century.

nameMeanings.name: Alexander
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Latin form of the Greek name Alexandros, from alexein ‘to defend’ + anēr ‘man, warrior’ (genitive andros). The name became extremely popular in the post-classical period, and was borne by several individuals in the New Testament and some early Christian saints. Its use as a common given name throughout Europe, however, derives largely from the fame of Alexander the Great , King of Macedon ( 356–323 bc ), around whom a large body of popular legend grew up in late antiquity, much of which came to be embodied in the medieval ‘Alexander romances’.

nameMeanings.name: "Alastair
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Altered spelling of Alasdair, the Scottish Gaelic form of Alexander . Alexander has long been a popular name in Scotland, having been borne by three medieval kings of the country. Alistair is now widely used in the English-speaking world, often by those without Scottish connections.

variants.name: Alister
meanings: Altered spelling of Alasdair, the Scottish Gaelic form of Alexander . Alexander has long been a popular name in Scotland, having been borne by three medieval kings of the country. Alistair is now widely used in the English-speaking world, often by those without Scottish connections.

variants.name: Allaster
meanings: variant spelling of   Alistair .  It is borne, for example, by a minstrel in  Sir Walter Scott's  Rob Roy (  1818 ), which ensured its 19th-century popularity.

en.lifeSummary: When Alexander "Alastair Carrach" MacDonald Lord of Lochaber, 1st of Keppoch was born in 1365, in Cruden Bay, Aberdeenshire, Scotland, his father, John Carrach MacDonald of the Isles, was 45 and his mother, Princess Margaret Stewart of Scotland, was 29. He married Margaret Lennox about 1390, in Scotland. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 3 daughters. He died in 1440, in Keppoch, Lanarkshire, Scotland, at the age of 75, and was buried in Keppoch, Lanarkshire, Scotland.

Il a épousé Margaret Lennox environ 1390, à Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé en 1440, à Keppoch, Lanarkshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 75 ans, et a été enterré à Keppoch, Lanarkshire, Écosse.

ja.lifeSummary: Alexander "Alastair Carrach" MacDonald Lord of Lochaber, 1st of Keppochが1365年にスコットランドアバーディーンシュアイアクルデン バイで生まれた時，父John Carrach MacDonald of the Islesは45歳，母Princess Margaret Stewart of Scotlandは29歳であった。約1390年にスコットランドでMargaret Lennoxと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1440年にスコットランドラナルクシュアイアケップオチで75歳で死去し，スコットランドラナルクシュアイアケップオチにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Alexander "Alastair Carrach" MacDonald Lord of Lochaber, 1st of Keppoch(이)가 1365년 스컷랜드 압르디실르 크루든 베이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Carrach MacDonald of the Isles(은)는 45세였고, 그의 어머니 Princess Margaret Stewart of Scotland(은)는 29세였다. 그는 대략 1390년 스컷랜드에서 Margaret Lennox(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1440년 스컷랜드 랜아르크실르 케프포치에서 75세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 랜아르크실르 케프포치에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alexander "Alastair Carrach" MacDonald Lord of Lochaber, 1st of Keppoch родился в 1365 г. в местности круден беи, абирдиншир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени John Carrach MacDonald of the Isles было 45 лет, а матери, которую звали Princess Margaret Stewart of Scotland, 29. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Lennox около 1390 г. в местности Шотландия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери. Он умер в 1440 г. в местности кеппоч, ланаркшир, Шотландия в возрасте 75 лет и был похоронен в местности кеппоч, ланаркшир, Шотландия.
